series_metadata.series_title: CONSENT AGREEMENTS AND PIIP MONITORING RECORDS
series_metadata.series_description: Records monitoring a nurse's compliance with the requirements imposed by the Board.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: Board takes action releasing monitored party from Board requirements, or Board action is taken based upon monitored party's non-compliance, or monitoring has not been active five (5) years, unless needed legal and/or administrative reasons. ; Paper: Board takes action releasing monitored party from Board requirements, or Board action is taken based upon monitored party's non-compliance, or monitoring has not been active five (5) years, unless needed legal and/or administrative reasons
